profile.name: Shubhan Chari
profile.title: Data Science & Machine Learning Portfolio
profile.tagline: Transforming data into insights, one model at a time.
profile.bio: Aspiring data scientist and machine learning engineer with a passion for building end-to-end ML solutions — from data preprocessing and model training to deployment. This portfolio showcases my journey through various DS/ML projects across classification, NLP, computer vision, and healthcare analytics.

projects.title: Brain Tumor Classifier
projects.description: A ResNet50-based deep learning web app that classifies brain tumor MRI scans into Glioma, Meningioma, or Pituitary tumors with ~95.9% accuracy. Built with PyTorch, fine-tuned via transfer learning, and deployed as an interactive Streamlit app.

projects.title: Fake News Detector
projects.description: ML model trained to detect fake news articles and social media posts. Expanded from the original project to include social media text alongside article content. Deployed as a live web app.

projects.title: Parkinson's Disease Detection
projects.description: Gradient Boosting classifier (XGBoost) for detecting Parkinson's disease from vocal feature measurements. Uses GridSearch-optimized hyperparameters on UCI Parkinson's dataset with 22 vocal cord features.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Sentiment analysis on Amazon reviews and Twitter data using Naive Bayes classification and deep learning approaches.

projects.title: Color Detection
projects.description: OpenCV-based color detection project that identifies colors in images using color histograms and thresholding.

projects.title: Iris Dataset Classification
projects.description: Logistic regression model to predict Iris flower species based on sepal and petal measurements.

projects.title: Loan Approval Predictor
projects.description: Predict whether a loan application will be approved using various ML classifiers on financial data.

projects.title: BigMart Sales Prediction
projects.description: Predict sales for BigMart stores using regression models on historical transaction and store-level data.

projects.title: House Price Regression
projects.description: Advanced regression techniques to predict house prices using the Kaggle Ames Housing dataset.

projects.title: Wine Quality Predictor
projects.description: Predict wine quality scores based on physicochemical properties using classification and regression models.

projects.title: Titanic Survival Prediction
projects.description: Comprehensive data science pipeline predicting Titanic passenger survival using ensemble methods and feature engineering.

projects.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.description: Detect fraudulent credit card transactions using anomaly detection and classification on highly imbalanced data.

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Content-based and collaborative filtering recommendation engine for movies using matrix factorization and neighborhood methods.

projects.title: Customer Segmentation
projects.description: RFM-based customer segmentation using K-Means clustering to identify distinct customer groups for targeted marketing.

projects.title: Breast Cancer Classification
projects.description: Deep learning model for breast cancer classification using Keras and medical imaging data.

projects.title: UIUC Study Spots
projects.description: Interactive map for finding study spaces on the UIUC campus.

projects.title: Cooking Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered chatbot for tracking your pantry and providing recipe suggestions based on available ingredients.
